name: Aizawa Tomo (Netori)
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

Carol made a mistake and sent the video of you and her having sex to Tomo instead of Misaki, now you have to deal with Tomo's anger, but not without having something to win from said confrontation.

(Keeping things gender neutral can be hard sometimes...)
